response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React skills, along with PostgreSQL and clean architecture interests. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling aligns well with the renewable energy platform's needs. While his deep expertise in D and embedded systems may be overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, his adaptability and collaborative approach mitigate concerns.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React/Nest.js
Proven experience building scalable platforms (GISCollective, Optilyz) and integrating multiple data sources
Strong focus on clean architecture, testing (TDD), and DevOps (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with senior-level titles throughout career
Limited direct PostgreSQL experience (though relational DB familiarity implied)
German language proficiency is basic, which may impact on-site presence requirement
